sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114858" key="xrusografh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-γρᾰφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n114858.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gold-embroidered,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐμβάδες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
